title: SENENQU 50 Pack Reusable Plastic Plate, 7 inch / 10 Inch Plastic Party Plates with Gold Rim, Unbreakable Dinner Plates for Weeding Birthday Party Catering
features: SUITABLE SIZE: Each package includes 25pcs 19cm /7 inch plastic plates and 25pcs 26cm / 10 inch unbreakable plates, providing enough quantity to meet your needs in daily life.

PREMIUM PLASTIC PLATES: Made of high quality food-grade PS material, each party plate is lightweight, sturdy, unbreakable and shatterproof. No need to worry about splinters and danger to your children. Also, the smooth surface and round edges without burr can prevent your hands and tabletop from scratching during use.

ELEGANT DESIGN: With the pretty golden rim design, our plastic picnic plates can perfectly match with different styles of decorations, adding an attractive look to your wedding, banquets and more other special occasions.

CONVENIENT TO USE: Our unbreakable plastic plates are heat-resistant, and each plate can resist high temperature up to 80℃, perfect for holding different kinds of food. The dinner plates are easy to clean up with soapy water and damp cloth; also, they are dishwasher-safe to save your time and energy.

WIDE APPLICATION: Our plastic party plates with golden rim can be used to hold main course, salad, snack, appetizer, dessert and other hot or cold food, perfect for wedding, birthday party, picnic, barbecue, camping and more other occasions, providing convenient and practical experience for you.
description: SENENQU 50 Pack Reusable Plastic Plates, Plastic Party Plates with Gold Rim, Unbreakable Plastic Dinner Plates for Weeding Birthday Party Catering PRACTICAL & ELEGANT PLASTIC PLATES FOR YOUR PATY RELIABLE QUALITY -Made of premium plastic material, each party serving plate is odorless and safe to use. -High quality plastic dinner plates are sturdy, durable and not easy to bend or break during use. -With the unbreakable plates, there is no need to worry about splinters or any unnecessary messes. -Smooth surface and round edges without burr are scratch-resistant and comfortable to touch. Special Golden Rim Design Make Your Delicious Meal More Attractive And Elegant WIDE APPLICATION -Suitable for holding main course, appetizers, pizza, dessert and other hot or cold food -Perfect for barbecue, wedding, birthday party, picnic, camping, dinner and so on -Ideal gift for your family and friends to add modern style to home SPECIFICATION -Material: PS Plastic -Diameter of small plate: 19cm / 7 inch -Diameter of large plate: 26cm / 10 inch -Color: White & Gold rim -Package includes: 25 x small plastic plates 25 x large plastic plates
